external_signal: Autonomously generated yeast functional-genomics hypotheses were experimentally confirmed and published in a top venue.
source: King et al. 2009 (Science); Sparkes et al. 2010

external_signal: Documented hallucinated results (e.g. ablation tables); the authors themselves advise not taking the generated scientific content at face value.
Outputs passed real human peer review (ICLR workshop track) and the system was published in Nature.
Reports closed-loop benchmark gains across twelve tasks but no independent third-party replication or audit was located.
Real chemistry was executed but the discovery loop is not closed (semi-autonomous design and execution only).
Its automated reviewer over-estimates quality by +2.3 points versus human PhD students; the loop is human-directed.
